title: Bathing Beauty
writer: Kenneth Earl, M.M. Musselman, Curtis Kenyon
actors: Red Skelton, Esther Williams, Basil Rathbone
plot: A contrived misunderstanding leads to the breakup of a songwriter and his fiancée. She returns to work as a gym teacher at an all-girls school, but a legal loophole allows the man to enroll as one of her students.
